name: Wok Steamed Corn Beef and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a wok with a steaming rack or a large heavy pan with a rack and a tight-fitting lid.
2. In the wok, place the beer, bay leaf, cinnamon stick, chili pepper, coriander, allspice, and mustard seed. Pour enough water to create 2 inches of liquid in the bottom of the wok.
3. Heat until steaming. Place the rack in the wok. Put the corned beef on the rack; cover and steam for 2 hours or until the meat is fork-tender. Add more water to the wok to maintain a level of 1-1/2 inches or 2 inches.
4. Combine mayonnaise, yellow mustard, and basil. Cover and chill.
5. Cut cabbage into 8 wedges. When the corned beef is tender, place the cabbage on and around the meat. Cover and steam for about 20 minutes or until the cabbage is still slightly crisp.
6. Remove the cabbage and corned beef. Slice the beef and arrange attractively on a serving platter. Place the cabbage around the beef slices; spoon the mayonnaise dressing over each cabbage wedge. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4-6 servings.
